title: tagetes cancellatus
intro: Tagetes cancellatus, also known as Mexican Marigold, is an annual herb plant in the daisy family, native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective against infections and wounds. The health benefits of Tagetes cancellatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, and it is also used as a natural insect repellent.
